markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.028 — Check of Driving Record

Before issuing a commercial driver’s license or commercial learner’s permit, the department shall check the applicant’s driving record as required by 49 C.F.R. Section 383.73.

*Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 752 (H.B.1888), Sec. 13, eff. January 1, 2016.*
